/usr/bin/ar qc libcore_lib.a CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/AnalysisResult.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/Strategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/StrategyFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/StrategyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/MACrossStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/MACDStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/RSIStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/BOLLStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/GridStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/EMA17TO25Strategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/EMA17BreakoutStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/EMAConvergenceStrategy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core_lib.dir/core/strategies/EMA25Greater17PriceMatchStrategy.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcore_lib.a
